sigils.title: Soulflame · Core of Being
sigils.meaning: Foundational inward identity—not passing state nor outward display
sigils.name: Soulflame Sigil
sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Represents the Core of Being. Soulflame is not a transient state nor outward phenomenon. It names foundational identity as inward continuity—stable presence of self that does not reduce to circumstance or mood.
sigils.usage: Character codification, identity pages, Underlay cues where foundational self—not passing mood—is the operative referent.
sigils.geometry: Continuity-bearing symbolic form; inward settlement rather than kinetic command geometry or ornamental outward thrust.
sigils.color: Bound to portrayed identity—not interchangeable or purely ornamental palette.

sigils.name: Top-Clear-Mind
sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Cognitive clarity without emotional suppression. Names unobstructed cognition—interpretive order, distortion checked, judgment legible—not euphoria, not identity substitution, nor narrowed trance attention.
sigils.usage: State designation; narrative moments of precise perception, reduced misread, and sustained discriminative judgment—not wellness framing, productivity-plot conceits, nor didactic coaching rhythm.
sigils.geometry: Radial symmetry; structural balance read as stable cognitive reference—clarity embodied as ordered form, not restful mood or ornamental softness.
sigils.color: Contrast and separation tuned for legible distinction—clear seeing without sentimental wash or decorative blur.

sigils.title: Top-Solid-Anchor / Sha-karys · Bearing Foundation
sigils.meaning: Load-bearing continuity—stable holding without spectacle or force display.
sigils.name: Top-Solid-Anchor / Sha-karys
sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Structural support of conscious existence under weight. Marks the capacity to hold position, continuity, and form under sustained load—without escalation, spectacle, or dominance display.
sigils.usage: Structural-support contexts: carrying consequence without collapse, preserving positional integrity, and holding continuity under sustained load—without spectacle.
sigils.geometry: Anchored load-bearing structure with grounded footing and stable vertical support; form reads as positional integrity rather than directional aggression.
sigils.color: Muted earth-steel range signaling dependable footing and steady load-bearing presence; no triumphal saturation.

sigils.title: Zenga Zellia · Reciprocal Resonance
sigils.meaning: Aligned recognition in mirrored relation—proximity without fusion.
sigils.name: Zenga Zellia
sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Relational resonance as structured alignment between two beings. Marks reciprocal recognition held in meaningful proximity—neither fusion nor sentimental overflow; preserves tension, distinction, and coherent relation.
sigils.usage: Relational alignment scenes: reciprocal attunement, reduced misread, and stable mutual orientation between beings—without social-drama framing.
sigils.geometry: Dual mirrored structure with reciprocal orientation; relational tension carried by balanced opposition rather than merged symmetry.
sigils.color: Magenta-led contrast as relational signal; quiet magnetic distinction without sentimental wash.

sigils.title: IAH-VEA · Declared Structure
sigils.meaning: Doctrine at rest as legible form—witness, not cultivation.
sigils.name: IAH-VEA
sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Inscription of declared structure—not felt, not trained. States what doctrine has already fixed as form—open, stable, and formally witnessed. Carries no implication of attainment, rehearsal, or affective cultivation.
sigils.usage: Publication and fixation of doctrine—marking what is formally held true and witnessing declared order. Operates as record and designation; not channel, enhancement, nor force projection.
sigils.geometry: Vertical pillar read as primary bearer of declared order; doctrinal spacing and inscriptional rhythm (steady interval, ruled bands); frontal seal- or tablet-surface posture—declarative layout, shallow subordinate top lintel only (thin inset stroke; not a full fascia or baseline), minimal lateral flourish.
sigils.color: Stone, ash, inscribed metal on neutral ground; restrained contrast; archival, not ceremonial saturation.

sigils.title: Top-Iron-Endurance · Bearing Under Load
sigils.meaning: Presence under weight—continuance without dissolution into relief or spectacle.
sigils.name: Top-Iron-Endurance
sigils.doctrine: Meaning / Function: Names continuance of conscious presence under load—endurance read as bearing, not spectacle. The sigil designates inner structure sustained when conditions stay difficult; it is not celebration, mandatory optimism, nor instruction to seek relief at the expense of integrity.
sigils.usage: Marks sustained effort through difficulty—identity held under consequence. Teaching and narrative framing; not packaged as activation choreography.
sigils.geometry: Vertical bearer resting on grounded cross-footing; restrained proportion; dashed interior suggesting sustained span held—load-bearing symbolism without ornament.
sigils.color: Iron and muted cool neutral—low saturation, patient weight.
sigils.underlay:
Lore context (secondary to doctrine): Readers meet this motif where a character refuses the easy dissolution of self when exits appear. Narrative explanatory layer only—distinct from operative doctrine blocks above.
---
Relations preview: Nearby to grounding-and-weight language used by Top-Solid-Anchor / Sha-karys; not interchangeable doctrine—shared vocabulary of stability, different symbolic stance.

sigils.name: Internal Test Fixture
sigils.doctrine: Internal testing fixture only. This entry is non-public, non-canon, and exists solely to verify discovery visibility boundaries.
sigils.geometry: Non-public test structure; not production narrative content.
